grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location under Hampton Brand
grant_and_term.term_new_construction: 22 years from Effective Date (midnight, last day of month)
grant_and_term.hits_agreement: Concurrent with FA, terminates with FA

fee_obligations.monthly_royalty: 6% of GRR, due 15th of following month
fee_obligations.monthly_program_fee: 4% of GRR, may increase by up to 1% over term
fee_obligations.calculation_method: Uniform System of Accounts for the Lodging Industry or as specified in Manual
fee_obligations.payment_method: Wire transfer or electronic funds transfer required if franchisor elects
fee_obligations.service_charges: 1.5%/month or highest legal rate on overdue payments
fee_obligations.business_interruption: Monthly fees based on forecasted GRR agreed with insurer

construction_obligations.ada_compliance: Architect/professional must certify compliance with ADA
construction_obligations.ada_survey: May be required within 30 days of request
construction_obligations.opening_authorization: Required before opening; may be withheld for non-ADA-compliance

operational_obligations.24_7_operation: Must operate 24 hours/day every day unless franchisor permits otherwise
operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with Manual/Standards at all times; subject to change
operational_obligations.management_company: Must be approved; if unsuitable, replace within 90 days
operational_obligations.reporting: Daily, monthly, quarterly, annual operating statements and other reports as required
operational_obligations.quality_assurance: Subject to periodic inspections, Stay Score assessments, and QA audits
operational_obligations.insurance: Must maintain minimum levels specified in Manual; franchisor named as additional insured

non_curable_defaults: Pattern of non-compliance (same breach twice in 24 months)
3 notices of material default in 12 months
Failure to operate for 5+ consecutive days
Conduct likely to adversely affect reputation
Related Hotel Agreement terminated for breach

transfer_restrictions.permitted_without_consent: Public equity, private <50% with no control change, institutional fund with same asset manager
transfer_restrictions.permitted_with_consent: Affiliates, family, death, cumulative >50% private change — 60-day notice + $5,500 fee
transfer_restrictions.change_of_ownership: 60-day notice + $200,000 fee + current-form FA + PIP + transferee must meet all requirements
transfer_restrictions.restrictions: No transfer to Competitor or Sanctioned Person

noncompete.during_term: Cannot be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. May be franchisee or manage competitor property.
noncompete.competitor_definition: Any entity that owns/licenses/franchises a Competing Brand, regardless of scale

guaranty_scope.scope: Full payment of all sums owed + performance of all obligations under FA and related agreements
guaranty_scope.waivers: Waives right to require action against franchisee first, subrogation rights, exhaustion of remedies, notices and defenses
guaranty_scope.indemnification: Guarantor must defend, protect, and indemnify franchisor from any actions arising from disputes between guarantors
guaranty_scope.spousal: May include spouse of owner at franchisor's determination

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_no_hotel_work: System's Avg Monthly Royalty × 60 (if build/operate another hotel at site within 1 year)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_under_2yr: Greater of Hotel's or System's Avg Monthly Royalty × 60
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Avg Monthly Royalty × remaining months
liquidated_damages.acknowledged_as: Reasonable estimate of minimum compensation, not a penalty

dispute_resolution.venue: E.D. Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County, VA state court; fallback New York
dispute_resolution.governing_law: New York (without choice-of-law principles), except Lanham Act
dispute_resolution.puerto_rico: Arbitration (AAA/JAMS, Federal Rules of Civil Procedure)
dispute_resolution.waiver_of_jury_trial: Standard FA may include (subject to state addenda)

insurance_requirements.specification: Per Manual — minimum levels and types, specified insurer ratings, franchisor named as additional insured
insurance_requirements.failure_remedy: Franchisor may obtain and maintain insurance at franchisee's expense

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must defend, hold harmless, and indemnify franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, and all affiliates' officers, directors, employees, agents
indemnification.coverage: Any claimed occurrence at hotel, any actions arising from franchise relationship

force_majeure.hotel_closure: If casualty requires closing, franchisee may repair/rebuild per Standards; must reopen within 18 months
force_majeure.election_not_to_repair: Franchisor may terminate without liquidated damages if franchisee does not own/operate competing hotel at site within 3 years
force_majeure.failure_to_operate_5_days: Non-curable default unless due to Force Majeure with reasonable mitigation steps

distinctive_clauses: HITS Agreement runs concurrent — separate technology agreement with HSS that auto-terminates with FA
Development Incentive Note — contingent liability, repayable on early termination/transfer, decreasing ratably
Shared Facilities Addendum — required if hotel shares facilities with non-System hotel
No right of first refusal (for Hampton brand); Right of First Offer exists for Hilton/Conrad brands only
All assets pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (Note 7 of financial statements)
Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate exists but no compensation paid
